definition: The sentence includes a period of supervision in the community under conditions set by the court.
The sentence includes confinement in a jail or prison.
The sentence includes a monetary fine payable to the court.
The sentence includes payment intended to compensate for losses caused by the offense.
The sentence includes a required amount of unpaid work performed in the community.
The court recorded a determination of guilt without imposing any additional penalty.
The sentence includes payment of court costs or administrative fees.
The recorded sentencing component does not fit any of the defined sentencing categories.
The sentencing information could not be determined from the available court records.
